_notes: 15:00 run — AI / Tech / Science channel, English output.
category_mix and topic_boosts identical to config/zh/story_mix_run2_ai.json.
platform_weight_overrides differ: English-language sources elevated,
Chinese-language platforms further suppressed.
Key differences from zh variant:
- youtube raised 0.10 → 0.80 (English tech/science channels are signal)
- reddit added 1.50 (strong EN tech discussion: r/MachineLearning, r/programming)
- weibo/baidu dropped 0.30 → 0.10 (Chinese-language content)
- news_rss raised 0.70 → 1.00 (English RSS feeds)
2026-06-09: category_mix rebalanced toward channel intent.
Problem: politics=0.30, society=0.30 were set for feasibility (they dominate
crawler supply), but on thin-AI-news days off-topic filler slipped through.
topic_boosts already filter well (ai=3.00 wins 80% of stories) but the high
politics/society allocation means too many candidates enter the pool.
Fix: raise ai/technology/science targets, cut politics/society headroom.
Consequence: batches may be 1 story (not 2) on thin AI days — accepted tradeoff.
Updated feasibility ratios (supply from 2026-04-14 crawl; recheck periodically):
ai         0.10/0.039 = 2.56  (slightly over 2x cap — batch may shrink)
technology 0.20/0.071 = 2.82  (over 2x cap — same)
science    0.10/0.035 = 2.86  (over 2x cap — same)
business   0.10/0.066 = 1.52  (fine)
politics   0.25/0.357 = 0.70  (well within supply)
